title: Item Landing Sound
description: This is a very simple Fabric mod, that plays a sound (based on block), at the block an item landed on.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
**Mod Description** **Item Landing Sound** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows items to make a sound upon landing on the ground. The sound played, is based on the block the item landed on; so if, for example, you threw a Diamond on a Stone Block, a high-pitched sound will play ("minecraft:block.stone.break", in this case), at the item that landed. Also, as of **[v1.0.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-landing-sound/version/1.0.2)**, there is a command (/itemlandingsound:volume ), that allows you to set the landing sound volume (0.0 - 2.0). Here's an example command if you wanted to set the volume of the sound to 0.0 (muted):
/itemlandingsound:volume 0.0
For reference of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below.
**Mod Demonstration Video**
**Why Download?** Items making sounds when landing on blocks is **realistic**, increasing the quality of life (Q.O.L), of Minecraft.
**Donation** If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
